context: Cloud-API frontier-judge re-eval (task #122 round 7) post iter-275 v8 engine promotion + iter-336 PHI source-scan lock-in. Companion to round-6 local-LLM run (composite 7.56 on n=5/6 Ollama Q4_K_M judges). Round-7 uses xAI Grok 4.1 fast-reasoning, Mistral Large, DeepSeek-Chat, Perplexity Sonar Pro, NVIDIA Nemotron Ultra 253B — frontier-tier reasoning models for higher-quality signal.

blocking_gaps_for_10_10.gap: Novel CS contributions like Q16.16 BitNet are innovative but lack peer-reviewed validation or production-scale benchmarks.
Clinical advisor attestation and cohort performance strong, but lacks independent third-party review or larger diverse patient validation.
1371 tests claimed with gates, but no CI logs, coverage reports, or live badge links provided for direct verification.
Detailed text walkthrough impressive, but lacks embedded video or live clickable demo for instant judge impact.

strengths: Exceptional JUDGES.md with 5-minute audit path and head-to-head differentiation table.
Core reproducibility primitive with Q16.16 bit-identical replay and Ed25519 audit chain.
Comprehensive FHIR R4 coverage, PHI discipline, and 100% recall on PCCP cohort.
Polished Apache-2.0 licensing with explicit patent grant and mind-mem ecosystem integration.

blocking_gaps_for_10_10.gap: Lacks peer-reviewed publication or preprint demonstrating novel CS contributions beyond BitNet adaptation.
No documented IRB review or prospective clinical validation study, only retrospective synthetic cohort.
Interactive demo requires local setup; no hosted live instance for instant judge access.
No accessibility audit (WCAG 2.1 AA) or dark mode support for clinical environments.

strengths: Bit-identical Q16.16 fixed-point reproducibility across architectures (x86_64/ARM64/RISC-V/Pi Zero/A100) with SHA-256 audit hashes — a true clinical-AI safety primitive.
21 CFR Part 11 audit chain with Ed25519 signing, SHA-256 predecessor hashing, and 30 unit tests — production-grade compliance.
100% recall on contraindicated/major/serious/moderate drug pairs (44/44 + 4/4 + 69/69 + 22/22) with zero false positives on negative-control cohort — clinical-grade precision.
Apache-2.0 with explicit patent grant and no buried licensing — deployable in production tomorrow.
1371 tests green, CI reproducibility manifest, and 18 FHIR R4 resource types — enterprise-grade test discipline.
21 typed federation invariants enforced at runtime with PHI gates — architectural rigor for multi-site deployments.
JUDGES.md is a masterclass in judge-centric documentation: 5-second hero, 5-minute audit, 60-second drill-down, and FDA Q-Sub draft — unmatched polish.

blocking_gaps_for_10_10.gap: No novel CS contribution beyond Q16.16 fixed-point; the BitNet b1.58 approach is a known technique applied to a new domain.
The core value proposition (bit-identical replay) is novel but the product does not yet demonstrate integration with any existing EHR or clinical workflow.
Only one clinical advisor (Dr. Afonicheva) and no formal IRB or institutional review board sign-off for the clinical validation.
The demo is text-only in JUDGES.md; no interactive live demo URL or video walkthrough was provided in the submission package.
The demo dashboard is described but not rendered; no actual screenshots or live link to assess visual hierarchy and brand consistency.

strengths: Bit-identical Q16.16 fixed-point replay across all architectures (x86_64, ARM64, RISC-V, Pi Zero, A100) — a genuine FDA SaMD reproducibility primitive.
1371 tests green with CI reproducibility-manifest check on every push; 30 Part 11 audit-chain tests; 49 FHIR adapter tests.
Apache-2.0 with explicit patent grant, single LICENSE file, no buried clauses — production-ready open-source licensing.
21 typed federation invariants enforced at runtime with PHI gate, Ed25519 signing, and X25519 sealing.
100% recall on 44/44 contraindicated pairs + 0 false positives on negative-control cohort, with evidence-backed sources (FDA, EMA, PubMed).
Comprehensive documentation: JUDGES.md, README.md, DevPost, FDA Q-Sub draft, clinical validation attestation, reproducibility manifest.
